title: apium catalaunicum
intro: Apium catalaunicum is a plant species within the carrot family (Apiaceae), native to the Iberian Peninsula, and is also known as Catalan celery or Catalan wild celery. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, as well as its ability to aid digestion and relieve flatulence. The health benefits of Apium catalaunicum include reducing inflammation, improving gut health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Apium catalaunicum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in cooking as a flavorful ingredient in Mediterranean cuisine.
